name: refactor-safety
description: Refactoring safety checklist: ensure behavior preservation through tests and incremental changes.
steps: Ensure comprehensive test coverage exists before starting (add tests if missing)
Run all tests to establish a green baseline
Make ONE structural change at a time (extract, rename, move, inline)
Run tests after each change to confirm behavior preservation
Review the diff — does it only contain structural changes, no logic changes?
Run the full test suite one final time
